NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case no. PED-12-295632 (Brian Leland Chow vs. Shanna Randall).

These matters come on calendar as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Mary Wiss, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

No appearance by the Petitioner: Brian Leland Chow.

No appearance by the Respondent: Shanna Randall.

The matters were called at 3:07 p.m., no appearance by any Party or Counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court orders the matters off calendar.
